[2019-10-28 14:15] vargus2254870 (Vargus225): such as making enemy pay more attack to destroy them

[2019-11-12 22:01] hyreon: I don't know if this puzzle has a solution but I've gotten pretty close, and would love to know for sure one way or the other.
Enemy has an Arka and that's it. You are P1, with a 6D / 2E start, but you also start with a synthesizer alongside them. You have all of base set and can build pixies / chrono filter / arka. All of that barely matters -- once you can tank Arka's attacks and produce your own econ, you should be able to win in just about any set.
**Defeat Arka.**
To survive with infinite supply:
1. ||EEF. Arka will leave you with 5:Drone: 2:Engineer: ; 1 :Gold: +:Green: ||
2. ||:Click: Synth, W. -> 5:Drone: 1:Wall: ; 1:Gold:||
3. ||FE. -> 4:Drone: 1:Engineer: 1:Wall: ; 3:Gold: +:Green:||
4. ||FD. -> 4:Drone: 1:Engineer: 1:Wall: ; 3:Gold: +:Green::Green:||
Attempting to boost econ:
5. ||EFD. -> 4:Drone: 2:Engineer: 1:Wall: ; 1:Gold: +:Green::Green::Green:. You end up with 5 gold next turn, just short to break the cycle with DD, EF, DF with +1, DF with +2, etc. Even then you might cut it close just because of supply limits||
[2019-11-12 22:05] hyreon: Edit: allowed using all of base set, even blastforges. Not that it changes the puzzle much if you are p1.
Also formatting
